summary: Completed frontend testing of Add Shopping Item feature with two options (AI Scanning and Enter Manually). All 7 features verified working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844).

minor.issue: Returns 400 error on page load - may be expected if no household selected

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning

passed_tests: 1. Clicking 'Add' button on Shopping List page opens dialog with two options: 'AI Scanning' and 'Enter Manually'
2. Clicking 'AI Scanning' option opens ShoppingBarcodeScanner dialog with title 'Scan Item for Shopping List'
3. ShoppingBarcodeScanner has three options: 'Take Photos' (AI Powered), 'Scan Barcode', 'Enter Manually'
4. Clicking 'Enter Manually' option shows manual entry form with Item Name, Category, Quantity fields
5. 'Back to options' link in manual entry form returns to method selection
6. Adding item manually with valid data successfully adds item to shopping list (count 76→77)
7. Duplicate item detection works - shows '⚠️ This item is already in your list' warning
8. Toast notification 'Item added' appears after successful addition
9. AI Scanner 'Take Photos' option shows Step 1 of 2: Product Name screen
10. AI Scanner has 'Open Camera' button and 'Skip & Enter Manually' option
critical_code_review_comments: ShoppingBarcodeScanner.js correctly replicates BarcodeScanner.js functionality for shopping list context
Duplicate detection uses case-insensitive comparison which is good UX
Dialog state management (addMethod state) properly resets when dialog closes
AI Scanner has proper error handling for camera access failures
seed_data_creation: Created test item 'TEST_Millet_3365' during testing - can be manually removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Shopping Item feature fully implemented and tested. Two entry methods: 1) AI Scanning - opens ShoppingBarcodeScanner with photo capture, barcode scan, and manual entry options, 2) Enter Manually - shows form with item name, category dropdown, quantity buttons. Duplicate detection prevents adding items already in list. Test user: testuser456@example.com / password123

add_dialog_two_options.details: Dialog shows 'AI Scanning' (orange, AI Powered badge) and 'Enter Manually' (outline) buttons

ai_scanning_option.details: Opens ShoppingBarcodeScanner with 'Scan Item for Shopping List' title. Has Take Photos, Scan Barcode, Enter Manually options

manual_entry_form.details: Shows Item Name input, Category dropdown (11 categories), Quantity buttons (100g-10kg for grains), Add to List button

back_to_options_link.details: '← Back to options' button returns to method selection screen

add_item_manually.details: Successfully adds item to shopping list, updates count, shows 'Item added' toast

duplicate_detection.details: Shows '⚠️ This item is already in your list' warning when entering duplicate item name

ai_scanner_photo_capture.details: Step 1 of 2: Product Name screen shows with Open Camera button and Skip option
